subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Think not that there existeth in all creation any matter greater than teaching. Teaching is the Divine decree [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause
